title: Extreme Weather Shelters - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COOLING CENTERS POLK COUNTY POLK COUNTY EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT COOLING SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on cooling centers during an extreme heat event. May offer additional cooling resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Cooling centers operate during heat advisories. Locations are open either throughout the summer season or when temperature thresholds are met. (503) 623-0175 Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER POLK COUNTY POLK COUNTY WARMING CENTER SEVERE WEATHER SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on warming centers during a severe weather event. May offer additional warming resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Warming centers operate during the winter months and during severe weather advisories. Locations are open either throughout the winter season or when temperature thresholds are met. (971) 702-2968 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
